user.bio: Graduate student in Computer Science with a strong background in full-stack web development and Computer Engineering. Currently working as a Graduate Teaching Assistant at SIUE, with previous experience as a Technical Team Lead and Full Stack Engineer. Passionate about building scalable applications and growing as a full-stack developer.

workExperience.description: Assisting in teaching and research activities in the Computer Science department.

Developed various web applications: a boutique store with React, Node.js, Express, and PostgreSQL; a portfolio management system for Nepal Stock Exchange; and an Animal Finder app with React and Express.

Led the merger of three departments into a Frontend Department, ensuring smooth knowledge transfer. Implemented micro frontends and mono-repo for large-scale projects. Led frontend architecture for Core Banking System and improved code quality with testing tools.

Led the design and development of the Employee Evaluation System, managing a dev team. Organized a Code Camp for skill development. Implemented GitLab pipelines and modern practices for workflow optimization. Conducted knowledge-sharing sessions and research on frontend technologies.
Built the Digital Lending System, integrating services like Digio and Finbit. Led a React team to develop the Nepal Audit Management System.

Built the Advertisement Management System and contributed to Smart MIS. Enhanced projects with Kanban boards, WYSIWYG editors, and React refactoring. Introduced TypeScript and delivered JavaScript training.
Developed the Weapon Inventory Management System for Nepal Police and improved the Online Police Clearance Report system. Created a data visualization module for NTIP.
Contributed to real-world projects under supervision and produced project documentation.
Developed and delivered training programs for Node.js and React Js, instructing over 30 participants.
